title: Potential A.J. Brown Patriots-Eagles trade reportedly has ‘framework in place’
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: A.J. Brown trade to New England Patriots may occur after June 1 due to Philadelphia Eagles' salary cap considerations.
Patriots reportedly have framework for trade with Eagles, potentially involving a future first-round pick for A.J. Brown.
Ian Rapoport indicates Patriots are hesitant to trade a first-round pick, delaying agreement on A.J. Brown deal.

title: Did you hear it? Here’s what we know about a big boom heard around Mass.
author: Heather Alterisio
bullets: Residents in Greater Boston reported hearing a loud boom Saturday afternoon, initially speculated to be thunder or an earthquake.
Meteorologists identified the source of the boom as a bolide meteor reentry, producing a sonic boom over eastern Massachusetts.
No evidence of any emergency situations was found following numerous 911 calls across Massachusetts, New Hampshire, and Connecticut.

title: Brayan Bello excels in bulk relief, but opener melts in Red Sox’ 4-3 loss to Guardians
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Tyler Samaniego allowed all four runs in his opening, leading to a 4-3 Red Sox loss to the Guardians.
Brayan Bello excelled in relief, pitching seven scoreless innings with five strikeouts and no walks.
The Red Sox are 23-33, 10 games under .500, and remain in last place in the AL East.

title: Giannis Antetokounmpo praises TD Garden environment amid trade rumors
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Giannis Antetokounmpo praised Boston Celtics fans and TD Garden's passionate atmosphere during a recent livestream.
Trade rumors link Antetokounmpo to the Celtics, but Miami Heat are currently favored to acquire him.
Speculation involves a potential trade including Jaylen Brown and possible three-team deals to facilitate Antetokounmpo's move.

title: Harvard ‘Senior Sunrise’ cut short by cops
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Harvard's Senior Sunrise on Weeks Footbridge was stopped by police due to crowd concerns.
Police from multiple agencies cleared the area after reports of blocked pathways and attempts to swim.
The event followed Harvard's commencement where Conan O'Brien was the keynote speaker.

title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair' is streaming on Peacock, featuring Uma Thurman's notable performance.
'The Truman Show' starring Jim Carrey is available on Paramount+ and YouTube.
'The Four Seasons' Season 2 is now available on Netflix with Tina Fey and Steve Carell.

title: Red Sox predicted to draft 18-year-old third baseman in 2026 MLB Draft by ESPN
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: The Boston Red Sox are predicted to draft 18-year-old third baseman Bo Lowrance in the 2026 MLB Draft.
Bo Lowrance is a 6-foot-5, 200-pound prospect from Christ Church Episcopal High School, committed to the University of Virginia.
Scouts compare Lowrance to MLB's Freddie Freeman; he is projected as a first-round pick, potentially at No. 20 by Boston.

title: Lowell father and daughter charged in alleged payroll tax scheme
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Lim Ou and Nalen Ou of Lowell charged with failing to pay $12 million in federal employment taxes.
Authorities allege the pair paid $48 million in cash without reporting to IRS via a Worcester check-cashing business.
Conspiracy and tax charges carry maximum penalties of five years in prison and fines up to $250,000.

title: Report: Christian Gonzalez unlikely to participate in OTAs under current Patriots contract
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Christian Gonzalez is seeking a contract extension from the Patriots, aiming for a salary of $32-35 million a year.
Gonzalez missed Patriots voluntary OTAs due to ongoing contract negotiations; he currently has a $4 million salary.
The Patriots recently restructured Mike Onwenu's contract, creating cap space potentially for an extension for Gonzalez.

title: Search underway for driver who led cops on a chase through Everett, Malden, Stoneham
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: A suspect led police on a chase through Everett, Malden, and Stoneham, striking a State Police cruiser.
The driver, wanted for drug issues, escaped on foot with a passenger after abandoning the vehicle in Stoneham.
No injuries were reported, and police assert there's no ongoing public threat while the search continues.
